children.text: section 310B(c), 310B(e), 310B(g), 310H, or 379E, or subtitle E, of the Consolidated Farm and Rural Development Act (, 1932(e), 1932(g), [1936b], 2008s, 2009 et seq.).7 U.S.C. 1932(c)

children.heading: Data
children.label: b Data
children.text: The data collected under subsection (a) shall include information collected from recipients both during the award period and for a period of time, as determined by the Secretary, which is not less than 2 years after the award period ends.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Not later than 4 years after , and every 2 years thereafter, the Secretary shall submit to the Committee on Agriculture of the House of Representatives and the Committee on Agriculture, Nutrition, and Forestry of the Senate a report that contains the data described in subsection (a).February 7, 2014

children.label: A
children.text: actions taken by the Secretary to use the data;

children.label: C
children.text: the number of business starts and clients served;

children.label: D
children.text: any benefit, such as an increase in revenue or customer base; and

children.label: E
children.text: such other information as the Secretary considers appropriate.
